ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., SP for speed, SR for success rate) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  "metric_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric category */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the metric value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric value */,
  "scale_1" REAL /* Performance metric value at scale 1 */,
  "scale_2" REAL /* Performance metric value at scale 2 */,
  "scale_4" REAL /* Performance metric value at scale 4 */,
  "scale_8" REAL /* Performance metric value at scale 8 */,
  "scale_16" REAL /* Performance metric value at scale 16 */,
  "scale_32" REAL /* Performance metric value at scale 32 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_metric_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_category_id") REFERENCES metric_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_status_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* New status of the project */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date of the status change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being recorded */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metric value was recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric at the time of recording */,
  "recorded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the metric value */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the metric value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_history_recorded_by FOREIGN KEY ("recorded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_history_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_history_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, QA analyst, executive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the user accessed the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_scales" (
  "scale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scale */,
  "scale_name" TEXT /* Name of the scale (e.g., Scale 1, Scale 2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scale */,
  "scale_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the scale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Speed, Success Rate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_metrics" (
  "project_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-metric association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "scale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scale associated with the metric */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the metric at the specified scale */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual value achieved for the metric at the specified scale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metrics_scale_id FOREIGN KEY ("scale_id") REFERENCES metric_scales ("scale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the report */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric included in the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_reports_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)
